title: Lellingeria militaris
taxonomy: Lellingeria militaris is classified as a species within the family Polypodiaceae, commonly known as the polypody ferns. This classification places it within the larger group of vascular plants, known as the Pteridophyta. The Polypodiaceae family is further divided into several subfamilies and tribes, and Lellingeria militaris is a member of one of these subgroups. The species is also classified as a member of the genus Lellingeria, which is a relatively small group of ferns primarily found in the Americas. Within the genus, Lellingeria militaris is often considered a distinct species due to its unique characteristics.
